{{基礎情報 公家 | 氏名 = 大鴨積命 | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 時代 = [[古墳時代]] | 生誕 = 不明 | 死没 = 不明 | 改名 = | 別名 = 大賀茂都美命、大賀茂足尼命<ref name="keifu">[[中田憲信]]「児島」『諸系譜』第二十六冊。</ref>、大賀茂足尼<ref name="keifu2">中田憲信「大神姓本系牒略」『諸系譜』第七冊。</ref> | 諡号 = | 神号 = | 戒名 = | 墓所 = | 官位 = | 主君 = [[崇神天皇]] | 氏族 = [[賀茂氏#地祇系|鴨君]] | 父母 = 父：[[大御気持命]]<ref name="keifu"/><ref name="keifu2"/>、母：乙名久志媛命<ref name="keifu"/>（出雲鞍山祇姫<ref name="keifu2"/>） | 兄弟 = [[大部主命]]<ref name="keifu"/><ref name="keifu2"/>、田田彦命<ref name="keifu"/><ref name="keifu2"/> | 妻 = | 子 = 大野宿禰<ref name="suzuki">[[鈴木真年]]「賀茂朝臣」『百家系図』巻五十五。</ref>、久努足尼<ref name="houga">[[宝賀寿男]]「二 三輪氏の起源と動向」『古代氏族の研究⑦ 三輪氏 大物主神の祭祀者』青垣出版、2015年。</ref>。 | 特記事項 = }} '''大鴨積命'''（おおかもつみのみこと、[[生没年不詳]]）は、[[古墳時代]]の[[豪族]]。別名を'''大賀茂足尼'''ともいう。
== 概要 == [[崇神天皇|崇神朝]]に[[葛上郡|葛城郡]]賀茂に移り住み、賀茂神社（[[鴨都波神社]]、または[[下鴨神社|下賀茂神社]]とも<ref name="keifu"/>）を奉斎し、それによって'''[[賀茂氏#地祇系|鴨君]]'''の氏姓を負ったとされる<ref name="suzuki"/>。『[[新撰姓氏録]]』賀茂朝臣条においても賀茂神社を奉斎したことを伝える。
各種系図では大鴨積命を大友主命の兄弟とするが、『[[肥前国風土記]]』[[高来郡]]条の記事に、大鴨積命の子・大野宿禰（神大野宿祢）が[[景行天皇|景行朝]]の人物として挙げられるため、大鴨積命は[[大友主命]]の兄弟ではなく、実際には大田田根子の兄弟に置かれるものと見られる。また、母も乙名久志媛命ではなく[[賀茂県主]]遠祖・鴨部美良姫（美良毘売命）と見られる<ref name="houga"/>。
== 後裔 == *[[賀茂氏#地祇系|鴨君]]（賀茂朝臣）<ref name="keifu"/><ref name="keifu2"/> *高賀茂朝臣<ref name="suzuki"/> *鴨部祝<ref name="keifu"/><ref name="keifu2"/> *三歳祝<ref name="keifu"/><ref name="keifu2"/> **[[葛木御歳神社]][[社家]] *[[磯部氏|石辺公]]<ref name="keifu2"/> *伊賀国鴨藪田公<ref name="suzuki"/> *賀茂伊予朝臣<ref name="suzuki"/> *賀茂首<ref name="suzuki"/> *伊予国鴨部首<ref name="suzuki"/> *賀茂宿禰<ref name="suzuki"/> *酒人君<ref name="suzuki"/> *賀茂宿禰<ref name="suzuki"/> **[[大和国]]、[[遠江国]]、[[阿波国]]、[[讃岐国]]、[[土佐国]]に分布 *鴨部<ref name="suzuki"/> **大和国、遠江国、阿波国、讃岐国、土佐国に分布 *賀茂役君<ref name="suzuki"/> *賀茂役首<ref name="suzuki"/>
== 脚注 == {{reflist}}
== 関連項目 == * [[大神神社]] * [[大神氏]] * [[鴨蝦夷]]

{{基礎情報 公家 | 氏名 = 大鴨積命 | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 時代 = [[古墳時代]] | 生誕 = 不明 | 死没 = 不明 | 改名 = | 別名 = 大賀茂都美命、大賀茂足尼命<ref name="keifu">[[中田憲信]]「児島」『諸系譜』第二十六冊。</ref>、大賀茂足尼<ref name="keifu2">中田憲信「大神姓本系牒略」『諸系譜』第七冊。</ref> | 諡号 = | 神号 = | 戒名 = | 墓所 = | 官位 = | 主君 = [[崇神天皇]] | 氏族 = [[賀茂氏#地祇系|鴨君]]（賀茂君） | 父母 = 父：[[大御気持命]]<ref name="keifu"/><ref name="keifu2"/><ref name="keifu3">中田憲信「大神朝臣」『諸系譜』第九冊。</ref>、母：乙名久志媛命<ref name="keifu"/>（出雲鞍山祇姫<ref name="keifu2"/><ref name="keifu3"/>） | 兄弟 = [[大部主命]]<ref name="keifu"/><ref name="keifu2"/><ref name="keifu3"/>、田田彦命<ref name="keifu"/><ref name="keifu2"/><ref name="keifu3"/> | 妻 = | 子 = 大野宿禰<ref name="suzuki">[[鈴木真年]]「賀茂朝臣」『百家系図』巻五十五。</ref>、久努足尼<ref name="houga">[[宝賀寿男]]「二 三輪氏の起源と動向」『古代氏族の研究⑦ 三輪氏 大物主神の祭祀者』青垣出版、2015年。</ref> | 特記事項 = }} '''大鴨積命'''（おおかもつみのみこと、[[生没年不詳]]）は、[[古墳時代]]の[[豪族]]。別名を'''大賀茂足尼'''ともいう。
== 概要 == [[崇神天皇|崇神朝]]に[[葛上郡|葛城郡]]賀茂に移り住み、賀茂神社（[[高鴨神社|高賀茂神社]]<ref name="keifu"/>、賀茂大神<ref name="keifu3"/>）を奉斎し、それによって'''[[賀茂氏#地祇系|鴨君]]'''の氏姓を負ったとされる<ref name="suzuki"/>。『[[新撰姓氏録]]』賀茂朝臣条においても賀茂神社を奉斎したことを伝え、『[[先代旧事本紀]]』においても崇神朝に賀茂君を賜姓されたと記される。
各種系図では大鴨積命を[[大部主命]]の兄弟とするが、『[[肥前国風土記]]』[[高来郡]]条の記事に、大鴨積命の子・大野宿禰（神大野宿祢）が[[景行天皇|景行朝]]の人物として挙げられるため、大鴨積命は大友主命の兄弟ではなく、実際には大田田根子の兄弟に置かれるものと見られる。また、母も乙名久志媛命ではなく[[賀茂県主]]遠祖・鴨部美良姫（美良毘売命）と見られる<ref name="houga"/>。
[[東大阪市]]の鴨高田神社で祀られている。

{{基礎情報 公家 | 氏名 = 大鴨積命 | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 時代 = [[古墳時代]] | 生誕 = 不明 | 死没 = 不明 | 改名 = | 別名 = 大賀茂都美命、大賀茂足尼命<ref name="keifu">[[中田憲信]]「児島」『諸系譜』第二十六冊。</ref>、大賀茂足尼<ref name="keifu2">中田憲信「大神姓本系牒略」『諸系譜』第七冊。</ref> | 諡号 = | 神号 = | 戒名 = | 墓所 = | 官位 = | 主君 = [[崇神天皇]] | 氏族 = [[賀茂氏#地祇系|鴨君]]（賀茂君） | 父母 = 父：[[大御気持命]]<ref name="keifu"/><ref name="keifu2"/><ref name="keifu3">中田憲信「大神朝臣」『諸系譜』第九冊。</ref>、母：乙名久志媛命<ref name="keifu"/>（出雲鞍山祇姫<ref name="keifu2"/><ref name="keifu3"/>） | 兄弟 = [[大部主命]]<ref name="keifu"/><ref name="keifu2"/><ref name="keifu3"/>、田田彦命<ref name="keifu"/><ref name="keifu2"/><ref name="keifu3"/> | 妻 = | 子 = 大野宿禰<ref name="suzuki">[[鈴木真年]]「賀茂朝臣」『百家系図』巻五十五。</ref>、久努足尼<ref name="houga">[[宝賀寿男]]「二 三輪氏の起源と動向」『古代氏族の研究⑦ 三輪氏 大物主神の祭祀者』青垣出版、2015年。</ref> | 特記事項 = }} '''大鴨積命'''（おおかもつみのみこと、[[生没年不詳]]）は、[[古墳時代]]の[[豪族]]。別名を'''大賀茂足尼'''ともいう。
== 概要 == [[崇神天皇|崇神朝]]に[[葛上郡|葛城郡]]賀茂に移り住み、賀茂神社（[[高鴨神社|高賀茂神社]]<ref name="keifu"/>、賀茂大神<ref name="keifu3"/>）を奉斎し、それによって'''[[賀茂氏#地祇系|鴨君]]'''の氏姓を負ったとされる<ref name="suzuki"/>。『[[新撰姓氏録]]』賀茂朝臣条においても賀茂神社を奉斎したことを伝え、『[[先代旧事本紀]]』においても崇神朝に賀茂君を賜姓されたと記される。
各種系図では大鴨積命を[[大部主命]]の兄弟とするが、『[[肥前国風土記]]』[[高来郡]]条の記事に、大鴨積命の子・大野宿禰（神大野宿祢）が[[景行天皇|景行朝]]の人物として挙げられるため、大鴨積命は大友主命の兄弟ではなく、実際には大田田根子の兄弟に置かれるものと見られる。また、母も乙名久志媛命ではなく[[賀茂県主]]遠祖・鴨部美良姫（美良毘売命）と見られる<ref name="houga"/>。
[[東大阪市]]の鴨高田神社で祀られている。
== 後裔 == *[[賀茂氏#地祇系|鴨君]]（賀茂朝臣）<ref name="keifu"/><ref name="keifu2"/> *高賀茂朝臣<ref name="suzuki"/> *鴨部祝<ref name="keifu"/><ref name="keifu2"/> *三歳祝<ref name="keifu"/><ref name="keifu2"/> **[[葛木御歳神社]][[社家]] *[[磯部氏|石辺公]]<ref name="keifu2"/> *伊賀国鴨藪田公<ref name="suzuki"/> *賀茂伊予朝臣<ref name="suzuki"/> *賀茂首<ref name="suzuki"/> *伊予国鴨部首<ref name="suzuki"/> *賀茂宿禰<ref name="suzuki"/> *酒人君<ref name="suzuki"/> *賀茂宿禰<ref name="suzuki"/> **[[大和国]]、[[遠江国]]、[[阿波国]]、[[讃岐国]]、[[土佐国]]に分布 *鴨部<ref name="suzuki"/> **大和国、遠江国、阿波国、讃岐国、土佐国に分布 *賀茂役君<ref name="suzuki"/> *賀茂役首<ref name="suzuki"/>
== 脚注 == {{reflist}}
== 関連項目 == * [[大神神社]] * [[大神氏]] * [[鴨蝦夷]] * [[飛鳥時代以前の人物一覧]]
{{Japanese-history-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおかもつみのみこと}} [[Category:日本神話の人物]] [[Category:古墳時代の人物]] [[Category:古代日本の人物]] [[Category:賀茂氏]] [[Category:大神氏]] [[Category:生没年不詳]]

'''Okamotsumi''' is a descendant of Watatsumi. See the family tree below for more info.
==Genealogy== {{User:Immanuelle/Generations of Watatsumi}} ==Footnotes== ===Notes=== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ===References=== [[Category:Original pages]] [[Category:Https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/]][[ja:%E5%A4%A7%E9%B4%A8%E7%A9%8D%E5%91%BD]]

{{Infobox Noble | name = Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = [[Kofun period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | renamed = | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | Buddhist_name = | burial_place = | rank = | lord = [[Emperor Sujin]] | clan = [[Ōgami clan]] | parents = Father: [[Ōtatane no Mikoto]]<ref name="#1">''Awaika Daimyōjin Genki''</ref> | siblings = [[Ōmiwa Ōtomonushi|Ōtomonushi no Mikoto]]<ref name="#1"/>, [[Ōtahiko no Mikoto]]<ref name="#1"/>, Ofunekimochi no Mikoto<ref name="#1"/> | spouse = | children = | notable_facts = }}
'''Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto''' (大鴨積命, birth and death dates unknown) was a prominent [[Kofun period]] [[chieftain]].
== Overview == According to the ''[[Shinsen Shōjiroku]]'' (Kamo Ason lineage), Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto is noted for having enshrined the [[Kamo Shrine]]. The ''[[Sendai Kuji Hongi]]'' records that during the reign of [[Emperor Sujin]], he was granted the surname of ''Kamo no Kimi''.
Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto is worshiped at the Kamo Takada Shrine in [[Higashiōsaka City]].
== Descendants == * [[Kamo clan]] (Kamo Ason)<ref name="#1"/>
== Notes == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}

'''Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto''' (大鴨積命, birth and death dates unknown) was a prominent [[Kofun period]] [[chieftain]].
== Overview == According to the ''[[Shinsen Shōjiroku]]'' (Kamo Ason lineage), Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto is noted for having enshrined the [[Kamo Shrine]]. The ''[[Sendai Kuji Hongi]]'' records that during the reign of [[Emperor Sujin]], he was granted the surname of ''Kamo no Kimi''.
Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto is worshiped at the Kamo Takada Shrine in [[Higashiōsaka City]].
== Descendants == * [[Kamo clan]] (Kamo Ason)<ref name="#1"/>
== Notes == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}

Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto is worshiped at the Kamo Takada Shrine in [[Higashiōsaka City]].

== Notes == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}

'''Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto''' (大鴨積命, birth and death dates unknown) was a prominent [[Kofun period]] [[Gōzoku|chieftain]].
== Overview == According to the ''[[Shinsen Shōjiroku]]'' (Kamo Ason lineage), Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto is noted for having enshrined the [[Kamo Shrine]]. The ''[[Sendai Kuji Hongi]]'' records that during the reign of [[Emperor Sujin]], he was granted the surname of ''Kamo no Kimi''.
Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto is worshiped at the Kamo Takada Shrine in [[Higashiōsaka City]].
== Descendants == * [[Kamo clan]] (Kamo Ason)<ref name="#1"/>
== Notes == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}

{{Infobox person | name = Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = [[Kofun period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | renamed = | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | Buddhist_name = | burial_place = | rank = | lord = [[Emperor Sujin]] | clan = [[Ōgami clan]] | parents = Father: {{ill|Ōtataneko|fr}}<ref name="#1">''Awaika Daimyōjin Genki''</ref>|siblings = [[Ōmiwa Ōtomonushi|Ōtomonushi no Mikoto]]<ref name="#1"/>, [[Ōtahiko no Mikoto]]<ref name="#1"/>, Ofunekimochi no Mikoto<ref name="#1"/> | spouse = | children = | notable_facts =|12=draft}}
'''Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto''' (大鴨積命, birth and death dates unknown) was a prominent [[Kofun period]] [[Gōzoku|chieftain]].
== Overview == According to the ''[[Shinsen Shōjiroku]]'' (Kamo Ason lineage), Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto is noted for having enshrined the [[Kamo Shrine]]. The ''[[Sendai Kuji Hongi]]'' records that during the reign of [[Emperor Sujin]], he was granted the surname of ''Kamo no Kimi''.
Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto is worshiped at the Kamo Takada Shrine in [[Higashiōsaka City]].
== Descendants == * [[Kamo clan]] (Kamo Ason)<ref name="#1"/>
== Notes ==
{{Reflist}} == See Also == * [[Ōmiwa Shrine]] * [[Miwa clan]] * {{ill|Kamo Emishi|ja|鴨蝦夷|12=draft}} * [[List of figures from before the Asuka period]]
{{Japan-hist-stub}} {{citation needed|Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto}}
==Genealogy== {{User:Immanuelle/Generations of Watatsumi}} ==Footnotes== ===Notes=== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ===References=== {{citation needed|Okamotsumi}}<!--Okamotsumi-->{{citation needed|Okamotsumi}}<!--Okamotsumi-->{{citation needed|Okamotsumi}}<!--Okamotsumi-->

revision.text:
{{基礎情報 公家 | 氏名 = 大鴨積命 | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 時代 = [[古墳時代]] | 生誕 = 不明 | 死没 = 不明 | 改名 = | 別名 = | 諡号 = | 神号 = | 戒名 = | 墓所 = | 官位 = | 主君 = [[崇神天皇]] | 氏族 = [[大神氏]] | 父母 = 父：[[大田田根子]]<ref name="#1">『粟鹿大明神元記』</ref> | 兄弟 = [[大三輪大友主|大友主命]] <ref name="#1"/>、[[大多彦命]]<ref name="#1"/>、意富禰希毛知命<ref name="#1"/> | 妻 = | 子 = | 特記事項 = }} '''大鴨積命'''（おおかもつみのみこと、[[生没年不詳]]）は、[[古墳時代]]の[[豪族]]。
== 概要 == 『[[新撰姓氏録]]』賀茂朝臣条において、賀茂神社を奉斎したことを伝え、『[[先代旧事本紀]]』においても崇神朝に賀茂君を賜姓されたと記される。
[[東大阪市]]の鴨高田神社で祀られている。
== 後裔 == *[[賀茂朝臣氏|鴨君]]（賀茂朝臣）<ref name="#1"/>
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == * [[大神神社]] * [[大神氏]] * [[鴨蝦夷]] * [[飛鳥時代以前の人物一覧]]
{{Japanese-history-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおかもつみのみこと}} [[Category:日本神話の人物]] [[Category:古墳時代の人物]] [[Category:古代日本の人物]] [[Category:賀茂朝臣氏|-おおかもつみのみこと]] [[Category:大神氏]] [[Category:生没年不詳]]

{{Infobox person | name = Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = [[Kofun period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | renamed = | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | Buddhist_name = | burial_place = | Rank = | lord = [[Emperor Sujin]] | clan = [[Ōgami clan]] | parents = Father: {{ill|Ōtataneko|fr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtataneko|qq=}}<ref name="#1">''Awaika Daimyōjin Genki''</ref>|siblings = [[Ōmiwa Ōtomonushi|Ōtomonushi no Mikoto]]<ref name="#1"/>, [[Ōtahiko no Mikoto]]<ref name="#1"/>, Ofunekimochi no Mikoto<ref name="#1"/> | spouse = | children = | notable_facts =|qq=draft|qq=draft}}
'''Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto''' (大鴨積命, birth and death dates unknown) was a prominent [[Kofun period]] [[Gōzoku|chieftain]].
== Overview == According to the ''[[Shinsen Shōjiroku]]'' (Kamo Ason lineage), Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto is noted for having enshrined the [[Kamo shrines|Kamo Shrine]]. The ''[[Sendai Kuji Hongi]]'' records that during the reign of [[Emperor Sujin]], he was granted the surname of ''Kamo no Kimi''.
Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto is worshiped at the Kamo Takada Shrine in [[Higashiōsaka City]].
== Descendants == * [[Kamo clan]] (Kamo Ason)<ref name="#1"/>
== Notes ==
{{Reflist}} == See Also == * [[Ōmiwa Shrine]] * [[Miwa clan]] * {{ill|Kamo Emishi|ja|鴨蝦夷|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Emishi|qq=}} * [[List of figures from before the Asuka period]]
{{Japan-hist-stub}}
==Genealogy== {{User:Immanuelle/Generations of Watatsumi}} ==Footnotes== ===Notes=== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ===References===
{{translated page|ja|大鴨積命|version=96145232|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:45, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox person | name = Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = [[Kofun period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | renamed = | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | Buddhist_name = | burial_place = | Rank = | lord = [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]] | clan = [[Ōgami clan]] | parents = Father: {{ill|Ōtataneko|fr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtataneko|qq=}}<ref name="#1">''Awaika Daimyōjin Genki''</ref>|siblings = [[Ōmiwa Ōtomonushi|Ōtomonushi no Mikoto]]<ref name="#1"/>, [[Ōtahiko no Mikoto]]<ref name="#1"/>, Ofunekimochi no Mikoto<ref name="#1"/> | spouse = | children = | notable_facts =|qq=draft|qq=draft}}
'''Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto''' (大鴨積命, birth and death dates unknown) was a prominent [[Kofun period]] [[Gōzoku|chieftain]].
== Overview == According to the ''[[:en:Shinsen Shōjiroku|Shinsen Shōjiroku]]'' (Kamo Ason lineage), Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto is noted for having enshrined the [[Kamo shrines|Kamo Shrine]]. The ''[[:en:Sendai Kuji Hongi|Sendai Kuji Hongi]]'' records that during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]], he was granted the surname of ''Kamo no Kimi''.
Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto is worshiped at the Kamo Takada Shrine in [[Higashiōsaka City]].
== Descendants == * [[Kamo clan]] (Kamo Ason)<ref name="#1"/>
== Notes ==
{{Reflist}} == See Also == * [[:en:Ōmiwa Shrine|Ōmiwa Shrine]] * [[Miwa clan]] * {{ill|Kamo Emishi|ja|鴨蝦夷|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Emishi|qq=}} * [[List of figures from before the Asuka period]]
{{Japan-hist-stub}}
==Genealogy== {{User:Immanuelle/Generations of Watatsumi}} ==Footnotes== ===Notes=== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ===References===
{{translated page|ja|大鴨積命|version=96145232|comment=Imported full ja history}}

'''Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto''' (大鴨積命, birth and death dates unknown) was a prominent [[Kofun period]] [[Gōzoku|chieftain]].
== Overview == According to the ''[[:en:Shinsen Shōjiroku|Shinsen Shōjiroku]]'' (Kamo Ason lineage), Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto is noted for having enshrined the [[Kamo shrines|Kamo Shrine]]. Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto is worshiped at the Kamo Takada Shrine in [[Higashiōsaka City]].

'''Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto''' (大鴨積命, birth and death dates unknown) was a prominent [[Kofun period]] [[Gōzoku|chieftain]].
== Overview == According to the ''[[:en:Shinsen Shōjiroku|Shinsen Shōjiroku]]'' (Kamo Ason lineage), Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto is noted for having enshrined the [[Kamo shrines|Kamo Shrine]]. The ''[[:en:Sendai Kuji Hongi|Sendai Kuji Hongi]]'' records that during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]], he was granted the surname of ''Kamo no Kimi''.
Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto is worshiped at the Kamo Takada Shrine in [[Higashiōsaka City]].
== Descendants == * [[Kamo clan]] (Kamo Ason)<ref name="#1"/>
== Notes ==

{{Infobox person | name = Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = [[Kofun period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | renamed = | other_names = | posthumous_name = | deity_name = | Buddhist_name = | burial_place = | Rank = | lord = {{ill|Emperor Sujin|en|Emperor Sujin|WD=Q333530|lt=Emperor Sujin}} | clan = [[Ōgami clan]] | parents = Father: {{ill|Ōtataneko|fr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtataneko|qq=}}<ref name="#1">''Awaika Daimyōjin Genki''</ref>|siblings = [[Ōmiwa Ōtomonushi|Ōtomonushi no Mikoto]]<ref name="#1"/>, [[Ōtahiko no Mikoto]]<ref name="#1"/>, Ofunekimochi no Mikoto<ref name="#1"/> | spouse = | children = | notable_facts =| gender = {{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}} | father = {{ill|Q108729784|WD=Q108729784}}; {{ill|Ōtataneko|WD=Q55536798}} }}
'''Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto''' (大鴨積命, birth and death dates unknown) was a prominent [[Kofun period]] [[Gōzoku|chieftain]].
== Overview == According to the ''{{ill|Shinsen Shōjiroku|en|Shinsen Shōjiroku|WD=Q1045362|lt=Shinsen Shōjiroku}}'' (Kamo Ason lineage), Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto is noted for having enshrined the [[Kamo shrines|Kamo Shrine]]. The ''[[:en:Sendai Kuji Hongi|Sendai Kuji Hongi]]'' records that during the reign of {{ill|Emperor Sujin|en|Emperor Sujin|WD=Q333530|lt=Emperor Sujin}}, he was granted the surname of ''Kamo no Kimi''.
Ōkamotsumi no Mikoto is worshiped at the Kamo Takada Shrine in [[Higashiōsaka City]].
== Descendants == * [[Kamo clan]] (Kamo Ason)<ref name="#1"/>
== Notes ==
{{Reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|Ōmiwa Shrine|en|Ōmiwa Shrine|WD=Q705542|lt=Ōmiwa Shrine}} * [[Miwa clan]] * {{ill|Kamo Emishi|ja|鴨蝦夷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Emishi|1=Kamo no Emishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q13635349}} * [[List of figures from before the Asuka period]]
{{Japan-hist-stub}}
==Genealogy== {{User:Immanuelle/Generations of Watatsumi}} ==Footnotes== ===Notes=== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ===References===
{{translated page|ja|大鴨積命|version=96145232|comment=Imported full ja history}}
